description: Demolition Permit — processes demolition permit applications, verifies asbestos surveys, utility disconnections, historic review, and OSHA compliance

hard_stops.label: Asbestos Survey Not Completed
hard_stops.logic: NESHAP-required asbestos survey has not been completed prior to demolition — violation of 40 CFR 61 Subpart M

hard_stops.label: Utilities Not Disconnected
hard_stops.logic: One or more utilities (gas, electric, water, sewer) have not been confirmed disconnected — safety hazard

hard_stops.label: Historic Structure — Demolition Blocked
hard_stops.logic: Structure is on the local, state, or national historic register — demolition requires historic preservation board review and approval

soft_flags.label: Demolition Debris Disposal Plan
soft_flags.logic: Demolition will generate significant debris — verify disposal facility acceptance and recycling plan compliance
